case_title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. SHAHADA HULL ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HULL, SHAHADA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 800 PRESIDIO AVENUE # 405 SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94115 SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, JUDGMENT APPLIESTO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENTANS IF ANY AND NAMED CLAIMANTS .SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 67139510)
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS, DECLARATION (TRANSACTION ID # 67064447) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED (TRANSACTION ID # 67107466) AS TO DEFENDANT HULL, SHAHADA
REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 67119870) AS TO DEFENDANT HULL, SHAHADA
UNLAWFUL DETAINER COVER SHEET (NO RENT DUE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT HULL, SHAHADA DOES 1 TO 5
ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT HULL, SHAHADA DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION RE: AUTHENTCITY OF LEASE (TRANSACTION ID # 67119870) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 67193171)
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY
WRIT OF POSSESSION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO
RETURN OF, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 67107466), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY SERVED NOV-09-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HULL, SHAHADA

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 67107466), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY SERVED NOV-10-2021, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 5
